endpoints.purpose: Runtime, provider, and D1 health check. Does not expose secret values.
Return prompt library from D1, falling back to static seed if needed.
Create an AI image generation job record in safe draft mode by default.
Return plan and credit entitlement. Defaults anonymous users to Free.
PayPal order contract. Live payment creation is gated pending final pricing/refund review.
Google OAuth readiness check without exposing client secret.

rateLimits.v0: Cloudflare WAF/rate limiting recommended before public paid launch
rateLimits.generation: server-side credit checks required before ENABLE_REAL_AI=true

privacy.uploads: R2 bucket planned; no public upload endpoint enabled in v0
privacy.logs: Do not log prompt photos, access tokens, payment secrets, or OAuth secrets
